head.title: 404 | Posit

div.class: dmb-notifications surface-dark bg-blue-600 text-white relative z-1
container container-default flex justify-end items-center relative z-1000
dropdown-content surface-light menu:bg-white menu:rounded-2xl menu:p-10 text-gray-200

h3.class: text-[24px] leading-[1.25] text-blue-600 font-semibold d-none menu:block menu:mb-8

span.strong: We help the world make sense of data

br.span: Open-source software for data science, research, and communication. Built to serve knowledge creators for the next century.

div.class: media aspect-361/258 mb-4 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden cover-image

div.span: Discover how the R and Python communities are bringing a human touch to the tools that solve real-world problems and drive meaningful progress.

div.class: dropdown-content surface-light menu:bg-white menu:rounded-2xl menu:p-10 text-gray-200

h3.class: text-[24px] leading-[1.25] text-blue-600 font-semibold d-none menu:block menu:mb-8

div.span: Partner programs, include standard resellers, managed service providers, and professional services.
For current Posit Resellers to register new deals.

div.class: container container-default flex items-center justify-between relative z-10
dropdown-content surface-light menu:bg-white menu:rounded-2xl menu:p-10 text-gray-200

h3.class: text-[24px] leading-[1.25] text-blue-600 font-semibold d-none menu:block menu:mb-8

div.class: menu_link_content menu-link-contentmain view-mode-simple menu-dropdown menu-dropdown-2 menu-type-simple
menu_link_content menu-link-contentmain view-mode-simple menu-dropdown menu-dropdown-2 menu-type-simple
menu_link_content menu-link-contentmain view-mode-simple menu-dropdown menu-dropdown-2 menu-type-simple
media aspect-361/258 mb-4 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden cover-image

li.div: Pinterest's People Analytics team eliminated risky PII downloads by connecting Posit Workbench directly to Snowflake. This resulted in stronger security, faster collaboration, and advanced statistical modeling for deeper insights. Read how they modernized their workflow.

div.class: dropdown-content surface-light menu:bg-white menu:rounded-2xl menu:p-10 text-gray-200

h3.class: text-[24px] leading-[1.25] text-blue-600 font-semibold d-none menu:block menu:mb-8

li.div: A secure, governed, and scalable data science editor, delivered through Posit Workbench
Activate a specialized agent directly in RStudio, transforming your IDE into a powerful collaborator for data analysis.
Code in RStudio or Jupyter Notebooks and easily share

div.class: menu_link_content menu-link-contentmain view-mode-simple menu-dropdown menu-dropdown-2 menu-type-simple
menu_link_content menu-link-contentmain view-mode-simple menu-dropdown menu-dropdown-2 menu-type-simple
menu_link_content menu-link-contentmain view-mode-simple menu-dropdown menu-dropdown-2 menu-type-simple

li.div: Share and update dynamic data insights and applications
Quickly publish and share Python and R work
Distribute and manage secure, scalable, package repositories for Python and R
Discover and install Python and R packages from CRAN, PyPl and Bioconductor

div.class: dropdown-content surface-light menu:bg-white menu:rounded-2xl menu:p-10 text-gray-200

h3.class: text-[24px] leading-[1.25] text-blue-600 font-semibold d-none menu:block menu:mb-8

div.class: menu_link_content menu-link-contentmain view-mode-simple menu-dropdown menu-dropdown-2 menu-type-simple
menu_link_content menu-link-contentmain view-mode-simple menu-dropdown menu-dropdown-2 menu-type-simple
media aspect-361/258 mb-4 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden cover-image

li.h4: Open Source is in Our DNA
li.div: We believe data science software should be free and open for everyone. Check out our latest open-source initiatives and libraries.

div.class: dropdown-content surface-light menu:bg-white menu:rounded-2xl menu:p-10 text-gray-200

h3.class: text-[24px] leading-[1.25] text-blue-600 font-semibold d-none menu:block menu:mb-8

div.class: menu_link_content menu-link-contentmain view-mode-simple menu-dropdown menu-dropdown-2 menu-type-simple
menu_link_content menu-link-contentmain view-mode-simple menu-dropdown menu-dropdown-2 menu-type-simple
dropdown-content surface-light menu:bg-white menu:rounded-2xl menu:p-10 text-gray-200

h3.class: text-[24px] leading-[1.25] text-blue-600 font-semibold d-none menu:block menu:mb-8

div.class: md:max-w-[700px] mx-auto px-5 relative z-3 text-center

div.span: What you're looking for is lost in the content jungle

div.p: And it might not come back. But that’s okay! We’re creating new content every day. In the meantime, scroll down to explore more of the Posit site.

section.class: layout layout--one-column layout-onecol relative bg-white py-section !pt-0

div.class: w-full block block-layout-builder block-inline-blockmedia block--kinetic block--media

img.alt: An illustration for a 404 error page featuring large, blue numbers "404" intertwined with a variety of whimsical animals and stylized plants.

div.p: There’s plenty of data science fish in the Posit sea. Check out the links below and see what insights you might be able to catch next.

div.class: group p-4 lg:p-6 relative flex flex-col rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-100

div.p: Visit the Posit Content Library to explore our full collection of expert-led webinars, deep-dive whitepapers, and step-by-step workflow demos designed to help you master R and Python at scale.

div.class: group p-4 lg:p-6 relative flex flex-col rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-100

div.p: Check out the Posit Demo Gallery to see live, interactive examples of what your team can build with R and Python with Posit solutions.

div.class: group p-4 lg:p-6 relative flex flex-col rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-100

div.p: Data science is better together. Visit our Events Page to find upcoming webinars, community hangouts, and global conferences. Whether you’re looking to network with peers or learn from industry leaders, there’s a seat at the table for you.

div.class: group p-4 lg:p-6 relative flex flex-col rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-100

div.p: Looking for deep dives into Quarto, tips for Shiny performance, or the latest on Positron? Our blog is where our engineering teams and guest experts share technical tutorials and 'how-to' guides designed to help you write cleaner, more efficient code."

section.class: layout layout--one-column layout-onecol relative bg-white py-section

div.h2: Keep up with all of our discussions about the possibilities of data science — in the present and the future.

div.class: group p-4 lg:p-6 relative flex flex-col rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-100

div.p: Exchange tips and knowledge about the various tools of R and Python.

div.class: group p-4 lg:p-6 relative flex flex-col rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-100

div.p: Get updates, shower thoughts, and other nuggets of wisdom that can fill your knowledge gaps. Share your own epiphanies and start the conversation with us.

div.class: group p-4 lg:p-6 relative flex flex-col rounded-xl border-2 border-blue-100

div.p: Join the conversation on the Posit Community Forum to get your technical questions answered and share knowledge with thousands of R and Python users from around the world.
